title: Netflix invented binge-watching. Now it may have outgrown it.
summary: Netflix viewers increasingly aren't returning for subsequent seasons, undermining the platform's core competitive advantage of binge-ready content. The article examines how binge-watching as a viewing model may have lost strategic importance amid growing competition and shifting audience preferences.
content: A new report suggests Netflix viewers aren’t sticking around for Season 2. The bigger issue may be that binge-watching itself is no longer the advantage it once was.

zh.title: Netflix创造了追剧文化。现在它自己可能已经超越了这一模式
zh.summary: Netflix观众越来越少地回来追看后续季节，削弱了该平台的核心竞争优势——即时可追看的内容。该文章探讨了在日益激烈的竞争和观众偏好转变的背景下，追剧观看作为一种观看模式如何可能已经失去了战略重要性。
